Paper_Metadata.Paper_Title: Harnessing laser-induced in-situ nanowhiskers for high-strength aluminum alloys via additive manufacturing

Composition_Info.Note: Nominal composition based on AA2024 alloy (Al-4.4Cu-1.5Mg) with 1.5 wt% B addition; MgAlB4 whiskers form in-situ from reaction of B with Al and Mg

Process_Text.original: LPBF using EP-M260 machine (Eplus 3D Tech Co., Ltd.) equipped with Yb fiber laser (wavelength ~1070 nm, spot size ~75 um, max power ~500 W); optimized parameters: P=300 W, v=1100 mm/s, h=100 um, t=40 um; stripes scanning strategy with 67 deg rotation between layers; short line scanning; substrate preheated to 45 degC; protective argon atmosphere; followed by solution treatment at 505 degC for 1 h, water quenching, natural aging at 25 degC for 30 days
Process_Text.simplified: LPBF (P=300W, v=1100mm/s, h=100um, t=40um) with ST (505C/1h) and natural aging (25C/30d)

Process_Info.Equipment: EP-M260 LPBF machine (Eplus 3D Tech Co., Ltd.); Yb fiber laser (~1070 nm wavelength, ~75 um spot size, ~500 W max power)

Microstructure_Text.original: Ultrafine equiaxed grain structure with random orientation (nearly texture-free); MgAlB4 nano-whiskers uniformly distributed throughout matrix (5-15 nm diameter, aspect ratio >20); whiskers located both within grains (~54%) and along grain boundaries (~46%); some whiskers intersect growing grains; partial theta phase (Al2Cu) observed adjacent to whiskers; pronounced Cu segregation at whisker-matrix interfaces facilitating interfacial precipitation; coherent interface between (0112)w plane of whisker and (200)Al plane with low lattice mismatch (2.5%);
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Ultrafine equiaxed grains (~1.5 um) with uniformly distributed MgAlB4 nano-whiskers (5-15 nm dia, aspect ratio >20); coherent whisker-Al interface (2.5% mismatch)

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 298.15 K; strain rate 0.5 mm/min (constant); extensometer for strain measurement
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: Dog-bone tensile specimen: total length 70 mm, gauge section 5 mm diameter, 30 mm length, fillet radii 6 mm
Properties_Info.Note: Solution treated (505C/1h) and naturally aged (25C/30d) MgAlB4w/AA2024

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 573.15 K (300C); held 15 min for thermal equilibrium before testing
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: Dog-bone tensile specimen tested on electronic universal testing machine (LE5105)
Properties_Info.Note: High-temperature tensile test at 300C; yield strength decreased due to recrystallization temperature of Al-Cu matrix being below this threshold

Properties_Info.Note: Solution treated (505C/1h) and naturally aged (25C/30d) MgAlB4w/AA2024

Process_Text.original: LPBF using EP-M260 machine (Eplus 3D Tech Co., Ltd.) equipped with Yb fiber laser; optimized parameters: P=300 W, v=1100 mm/s, h=100 um, t=40 um; stripes scanning strategy with 67 deg rotation between layers; substrate preheated to 45 degC; protective argon atmosphere; as-built condition without solution treatment
Process_Text.simplified: LPBF (P=300W, v=1100mm/s) as-built without post-heat treatment

Process_Info.Equipment: EP-M260 LPBF machine (Eplus 3D Tech Co., Ltd.)

Microstructure_Text.original: MgAlB4 whiskers with typical whisker morphology; diameters 5-15 nm, lengths up to several hundred nm; aspect ratios >20; randomly oriented and uniformly distributed throughout matrix; some whiskers entrapped within grains, others along grain boundaries;
Microstructure_Text.simplified: MgAlB4 nano-whiskers (5-15 nm dia, aspect ratio >20) uniformly distributed; as-built microstructure

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 298.15 K; strain rate 0.5 mm/min (constant); extensometer for strain measurement
at 298.15 K; strain rate 0.5 mm/min (constant); extensometer for strain measurement
at 298.15 K; strain rate 0.5 mm/min (constant); extensometer for strain measurement

Composition_Info.Note: Pure AA2024 without boron addition used as baseline comparison

Process_Text.original: LPBF using EP-M260 machine (Eplus 3D Tech Co., Ltd.) with same optimized parameters as MgAlB4w/AA2024: P=300 W, v=1100 mm/s, h=100 um, t=40 um; stripes scanning strategy with 67 deg rotation between layers; substrate preheated to 45 degC; protective argon atmosphere
Process_Text.simplified: LPBF (P=300W, v=1100mm/s, h=100um, t=40um) baseline AA2024 without B addition

Process_Info.Equipment: EP-M260 LPBF machine (Eplus 3D Tech Co., Ltd.)

Microstructure_Text.original: Coarse columnar grains extending over several tens to hundreds of um across multiple melt pools; strong <001> texture parallel to build direction; cracks clearly observed along columnar grain boundaries propagating across several grains; large pores predominantly located near grain boundaries; high defect density
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Coarse columnar grains (~18.2 um) with strong <001> texture; cracks along GBs; high porosity (defect fraction 4.698%)
